programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi's childhood friends go to Bhide's home searching for him. Shortly after, Jethalal calls Sodhi and informs him about what happened.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Poptalal and Sodhi party with Sodhi's childhood friends. Afterwards, Roshan is furious to learn that the residents of Gokuldham did not inform her about Sodhi's illness.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tries to convince Roshan to stay at Bhide's house and not to check up on Sodhi. Later, Roshan calls Sodhi and realises that he is lying.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A furious Champaklal chases Jethalal with a stick after learning about his lies. Shortly after, he makes him call Sodhi who admits that he is enjoying himself thoroughly.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan and other Gokuldham residents overhear Sodhi bragging to his friends. Later, Anjali and Babita plead with Roshan to listen to Sodhi's side of the story.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sodhi informs Roshan that he wanted to party as he met his friends after five years. Later, a furious Roshan threatens to leave him and stay with her parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As everything has ended on a good note between Sodhi and Roshan, Gokuldham society members look forward to a new day.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: After analysing the dead bodies of three men, Dr Salunkhe affirms that the killer murders like a wild animal. Later, Team CID uses their wit and the doctor's suggestion to nab the culprit.

programme.title: CID

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Champaklal about the prizes won by the residents of Gokuldham. Later, Nattu Kaka reveals that Babita got the car.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita is terrified after having a nightmare about her coupon. Later, Jethalal leaves the house after taking everyone's coupons with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babita pleads with Jethalal to have the car delivered the following day. Later, Jethalal reveals that the vehicle cannot be handed over in time.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: As Jethalal stamps the coupons, he realises that the pre-inked porous pad is dry. Later, Jethalal accidentally spills ink on a coupon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal receives a certificate of appreciation from Ramsung. Later, Jethalal decides to tell Rustom that he does not possess the car coupon.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha works hard to keep the truth from Babita and Rustom. Meanwhile, the Mahila Mandal excitedly waits for Babita's new car.

programme.title: CID

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: An escape room murder leads to suspicion among the participants and the staff. Soon, the CID team attempts to investigate.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide and his family head out in a cab, while Popatlal is waiting for the plumber. He receives a call asking him to get to the office as soon as possible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: ACP Pradyuman's team investigates the Gokuldham residents for possible suspects. Later, Bhide is caught in a lie.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The CID team realise that Gokuldham society members are lying to them. Later, Dr Hathi and Jethalal become the prime suspects.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked when Abhijeet and Daya reveal the name of the ruby thief. The ACP interrogates Iyer and Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Gokuldham society members try to prove that Iyer and Babita are innocent. However, the lawyer reveals that their case is weak.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Things get complicated when Dewan is suddenly found dead. Later, Iyer and Babita are taken into police custody.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: A man enters a coffee shop and seeks financial help from people to save someone's life. Meanwhile, a man collapses while walking in a dizzy state before reaching the medical store.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: One of the contestants on a survival-based reality show informs Team CID about murders taking place on the island. However, he soon dies and the CID team also gets trapped on the island.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Megastar Niharika is attacked at the premiere of her comeback film and her manager is killed. The common belief is that her stalker has returned, but Niharika and her husband reveal startling facts.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When a boy dressed in women's clothes commits suicide in a college, Team CID is called to investigate. Although he was ragged, the team must determine if it was a cover-up for a larger conspiracy.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Amidst Shweta and Hitesh's anniversary celebrations near a cliff, a girl named Nisha appears and warns them about a threat. Sure enough, Shweta disappears after a call and is later found dead.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Dr Salunkhe manages to save Daya's life by performing an emergency medical procedure. Later, the CID team finds a dead body inside the vault and discover an entrance to a long tunnel.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Bhatkati Pari creates illusions and diverts the demons to stop them from escaping. Further, after successfully sealing the gates of Danav Lok, Baalveer brings Meher home.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Meher finally returns home, she is extremely happy to meet her family members. Further, Tauba Tauba disguises himself as a rabbit and enters Meher's house in order to kill Baalveer.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When a new student disrespects the teacher, Meher and her friends are shocked. Meanwhile, in Pari Lok, the fairies try to rescue Dooba Dooba.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Montu and his friends come up with a plan to lock Chaya, the new student, in a room. However, when she magically appears out of nowhere, Montu panics.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When two men attempt to kidnap Meher, Baalveer comes to her rescue. Later, the children are excited as Baalveer takes up the role of Lord Krishna in their play.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Chaya Pari comes to meet Mahabhasm Pari, she reveals her plan to defeat Baalveer. Meanwhile, Baalveer arrives in Pari Lok and surprises the fairies with his attire.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: When Montu tells Baalveer about Chaya's behaviour, he decides to find the truth. Later, the children take the stage to perform a play about Lord Krishna's life.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: As the play continues, Chaya Pari uses her magic to swap places with Montu. Meanwhile, Mahabhasm Pari and Tauba Tauba eagerly wait for Chaya Pari to attack Baalveer.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal envisions being wished about getting married during his birthday celebration. However, he does want to be pitied so tries to avoid the celebration.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Despite all of Tapu Sena's efforts, Popatlal is determined to spend his birthday alone. Later, Popatlal hears everyone talking about an important issue.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal's health takes a turn for the worse, Dr Hathi is summoned to treat him. However, things take a surprising turn when Dr Hathi struggles to treat Champaklal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Champaklal finds himself stuck to the door, the residents of Gokuldham strive to save him. However, when all else fails, they decide to call the fire brigade.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is in for a surprise when Shetty visits his electronic store and is impressed with his salesmanship. Jethalal is thrilled as Shetty places a huge order with him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Babu Chipke is annoyed when Jethalal keeps criticising his every move. He decides not to do any of the society's work, much to the other residents' dismay.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is happy to learn that Iyer has found a solution to Bapuji's problem. However, they learn that he cannot get the solution from the laboratory.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal starts to feel tired as they wait for the solution to melt the glue. Iyer suggests that they can use lemon juice instead of the chemical solution.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Unable to get his tea, an upset Jethalal calls Bagha to fix his broken gas stove. Daya's hand gets injured.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Because Daya has injured her hand, Babita helps her prepare breakfast for everyone, which makes Jethalal happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal tells Babita's friend she can pay for the phone later after noticing that she has forgotten her purse. However, he soon realises the woman is not Babita's friend.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is glad when Babita comes to their house and helps prepare breakfast after Daya accidentally injures her hand.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka encounters a friend who informs him of a pay rise. He eventually urges Nattu Kaka to challenge Jethalal for higher wages.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After hearing Bhura talk about going on a strike against his boss for an increased salary, Bagha and Natu Kaka want to ask Jethalal for increased salaries as well.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Natu Kaka and Bagha demand through a written letter that Jethalal increase their salaries in 24 hours. Jethalal consults Taarak about the problem.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is tired of Natu Kaka and Bagha's messages and asks them for time to consider. However, Natu Kaka tells Jethalal they are going on a strike.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal's friends advise him to convince Natu Kaka and Bagha to stop their strike. Things get worse when the strike is reported in the news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Nattu Kaka and Bagha succeed in convincing Jethalal to raise their salaries, but they hear that Bhura's boss has fired him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Goddess Lakshmi comes to Jethalal in a dream and tells him to preserve his wealth. Popatlal asks Jethalal for notes of higher denominations.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal wants to arrange a surprise party for members of the society. He asks Bhide for permission to use the club house and invites everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Popatlal is busy with the preparation, the ladies are curious about his surprise, but the men decide not to go to his party, making Popatlal upset.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After Popatlal blackmails them, all men finally agree to go to the party. All the members of Gokuldham society gather at the party, and make guesses about Popatlal's surprise.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal admits that it is his son's 10th birthday and reveals to everyone in the society that his umbrella is the son he talked about before.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham society is fraught with chaos when Popatlal learns that someone stole his umbrella. All the members start searching for his umbrella.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After members of Gokuldham society cannot find Popatlal's umbrella, they call the police officers to help. Abdul later finds the umbrella but in a broken condition.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena calls everyone to gather in the clubhouse after deciding to find the mastermind behind the disappearance of Popatlal's umbrella.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Daya play a game of statues with each other. To help Daya win the game, Iyer tries to distract Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal is annoyed with Iyer's behaviour during the game of statues. Later, he decides to teach Iyer a lesson.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Daya tells Madhavi about playing a game with Jethalal, it grabs everyone's attention and soon they are all hooked on it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While Iyer tries to evade Jethalal, the latter does not give up and makes elaborate plans to avenge himself.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The chaos makes Bhide angry and he demands an explanation from Iyer, not knowing that he is the innocent one.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Inspector Pandey suddenly arrives at the scene and asks Jethalal to come to the police station, it surprises everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After an argument with Natu Kaka, Jethalal gets furious. However, things cool down when Jethalal meets Babita.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal accidentally gives the 100 rupee note with Babita's relative's number written on it to an auto driver.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal makes up a story to cover up his mistake of losing the important phone number. Babita eagerly waits for Jethalal's phone call.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Baagha looks for the auto driver. Jethalal asks Natu Kaka to lie so that Babita feels better as she was constantly trying his number.
